content: Fix P0 blocker: Add Buffer API key to /app/backend/.env
Review Buffer integration playbook and existing backend structure
Set up Buffer API client in FastAPI backend
Create Buffer API endpoints (connect accounts, create posts, schedule, upload media)
Build Instagram Management UI tab with simple/advanced modes
Implement Reels and Carousel post types in UI
Test complete Buffer API integration (backend + frontend)
Add Kling API to Phase 5 roadmap for video generation
